---
title: "calculating emergence date"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
hatch_dates <- read.csv(here("data", "raw data", "wild moths hatch dates.csv"))
```

```{r}
# Convert to Date
hatch_dates$capture_date <- as.Date(hatch_dates$capture_date, format = "%d/%m/%Y")

# Calculate median date
median_date <- median(hatch_dates$capture_date, na.rm = TRUE)
#median emergence date is the 28th november 2025
```
